nasb.text: The pavement (that is, the lower pavement) was by the side of the gates, corresponding to the length of the gates.

esv.text: And the pavement ran along the side of the gates, corresponding to the length of the gates. This was the lower pavement.

cnv.text: 鋪石地在各大門的旁邊，比門矮一點，寬度與門的長度相同。

ccb.text: 铺石地在门口的两边，比内院低，宽度与入口的长度一样。
